statement_text: Creativity should have equal status to literacy.
Creativity is as important as literacy in education.
Children starting school now will retire in 2065.
Everyone has a vested interest in education's future role.
Education is a deeply personal topic similar to religion and money.
People are very interested in discussing their education.
People react negatively when you say you work in education.
People avoid asking about education work.
Interest in education is shared by everyone.
Three themes running through conference relevant to my talk.
Extraordinary evidence of human creativity in presentations and people.
No idea how future may play out.
